_comment: Projects shown on the homepage (#projects, recent few) and the /project/ page (all, paginated). Numbering is automatic (newest/top = highest number). EXAMPLES below — replace with real projects. Fields: title, period(기간 — 월까지, 예: "2024.03 – present" 또는 "2022.03 – 2024.02"), role, funder, description, url(optional). 정렬은 period의 시작 연·월 기준 최신순.

projects.title: Development of Trustworthy Agentic AI Technologies for the Trust AI Ecosystem
projects.funder: Ministry of Science and ICT & Institute of Information & communications Technology Planning & Evaluation (IITP)
projects.description: To establish a trustworthy Agentic AI ecosystem by developing verifiable identity, authentication, authorization, and data trust technologies for autonomous AI agents and multi-agent systems.

projects.title: Research on Blockchain-Based Data Management Technologies to Ensure Data Sovereignty for Digital Assets in Web 3.0 Environments
projects.funder: KOREA INSTITUTE OF INFORMATION SECURITY & CRYPTOLOGY
projects.description: To develop blockchain-based technologies for decentralized management, ownership verification, access control, and secure sharing of digital assets while preserving data sovereignty in Web 3.0 ecosystems.

projects.title: Development of Secure Drone Communication Technologies and Testbeds Using Wireless Signal Feature-Based Secret Key Generation
projects.description: To develop cryptographic modules and testing environments for secure and resilient communication among drones in autonomous aerial networks.
